text:
What my father means to me is that he's 
hardworking,caring,funny towards us.Hes my whole life to me and 
my family.He shows that he is all those things because of all his 
actions.He  car  that he's hardworking because he works hard to 
pay the necessary stuff like food.He’s caring to my family because 
he doesn't yell at us or really get mad at us.He’s funny because 
he jokes around with me and sometimes scare’s me which I think 
is funny.Thats all the reasons why he means alot for me and my 
family.We are lucky to have him.
